# BattleRobots — Project Roadmap

## Vision
A physics-driven robot combat game built in Unity. Players assemble modular robots,
enter battle arenas, earn currency from wins, and unlock upgraded parts. All physics
uses ArticulationBody exclusively. The economy, save system, and event bus are SO-driven.

---

## Architecture Rules (enforced every session)
- **ArticulationBody only** — never Rigidbody for robot parts
- **No heap allocations** in Update / FixedUpdate
- **SO Event Channels** for all cross-component communication
- **SO assets immutable at runtime** — write only through designated mutator methods
- **XOR SaveSystem** for all persistence (MatchRecord, Wallet snapshot)
- **BattleRobots.UI** must never reference **BattleRobots.Physics**
- **PlayerWallet**: SO for runtime state, MatchRecord for persistence
- Namespaces: `BattleRobots.Core` / `BattleRobots.Physics` / `BattleRobots.UI` / `BattleRobots.Editor`

---

| T398 | ZoneControlCaptureStreakBonusSO + ZoneControlCaptureStreakBonusController — escalating per-capture bonus based on current capture streak; RecordCapture() returns bonus (baseBonus + (streak-1)*bonusPerStreak); BreakStreak() resets; clamped to maxStreak; "Streak: N" + "Bonus: +N" HUD | 70 | **Done** | ZoneControlCaptureStreakBonusSO SO (Core, CreateAssetMenu "BattleRobots/Arena/ZoneControlCaptureStreakBonus"): _baseBonus [Min(0)] default 50; _bonusPerStreak [Min(0f)] default 25f; _maxStreak [Min(1)] default 10; optional _onStreakBonus VoidGameEvent; runtime _currentStreak/_lastBonusAwarded/_totalBonusAwarded. OnEnable→Reset(). RecordCapture(): increments streak clamped to maxStreak; computes bonus=baseBonus+(streak-1)*bonusPerStreak; accumulates totalBonusAwarded; fires event; returns bonus. BreakStreak(): resets streak and lastBonus to 0. Reset(): clears all silently. Properties: CurrentStreak/MaxStreak/LastBonusAwarded/TotalBonusAwarded/BaseBonus/BonusPerStreak. ZoneControlCaptureStreakBonusController MB (BattleRobots.UI, DisallowMultipleComponent): _onZoneCaptured→HandleZoneCaptured→RecordCapture+wallet?.AddFunds(bonus)+Refresh; _onMatchStarted/_onMatchEnded→Reset+Refresh; _onStreakBonus→Refresh; Refresh: null→hide; show+streakLabel="Streak: N"+bonusLabel="Bonus: +N"; StreakBonusSO property. 12 new EditMode tests. **12 new tests. 6025 total tests across 455 test files. | T363 | ZoneControlDifficultyRampSO + ZoneControlDifficultyRampController — linear time-based difficulty ramp from startDifficulty to endDifficulty with per-frame Tick and match lifecycle wiring | 76 | **Done** | ZoneControlDifficultyRampSO SO (Core, CreateAssetMenu "BattleRobots/Arena/ZoneControlDifficultyRamp"): _rampDuration [Min(1f)] default 120f; _startDifficulty/endDifficulty [Range(0,1)]; optional _onDifficultyChanged VoidGameEvent; runtime _elapsedTime/_isActive/_currentDifficulty (not serialized). OnEnable→Reset(). StartRamp(): _isActive=true+_elapsedTime=0+_currentDifficulty=start+fire event. Tick(float dt): !_isActive→return; advance elapsed clamped to duration; t=elapsed/duration; currentDifficulty=Lerp(start,end,t); fire event. Reset(): _isActive=false; _elapsedTime=0; _currentDifficulty=start (silent). OnValidate clamps. Properties: CurrentDifficulty/ElapsedTime/IsActive/RampDuration/StartDifficulty/EndDifficulty. ZoneControlDifficultyRampController MB (BattleRobots.UI, DisallowMultipleComponent): optional _rampSO (Data); optional _onMatchStarted (In→HandleMatchStarted→StartRamp); optional _onMatchEnded (In→HandleMatchEnded→Reset); optional _onDifficultyChanged (In→Refresh); optional _difficultyLabel Text+_panel; Update→Tick(Time.deltaTime); Refresh: null SO→hide; show; label="Difficulty: F2". 12 new EditMode tests. **12 new tests. 5595 total tests across 420 test files. OnEnable→Reset(). ComputeQuality(int,float,int)→int: totalWeight=sum of weights; ≤0→0; normalise each input to [0,1]; weighted average×100 rounded; cache+fire event+return. Reset(): _lastQuality=0 (silent). Properties: LastQuality/ZoneScaleDivisor/PaceScaleDivisor/MaxRating/ZoneWeight/PaceWeight/RatingWeight. OnEnable→Reset(). RecordCapture(float): Prune+Add+EvaluateBurst. Tick(float): Prune+EvaluateBurst. GetCapturesInWindow(float): Prune+return Count. Reset(): clears timestamps+_isBurst=false (silent). OnEnable→Reset(). EvaluatePressure(bool botLeads): botLeads→IncreasePressure else DecreasePressure. IncreasePressure(): +=increment clamped to 1; if !_isHighPressure&amp;&amp;>=threshold→_isHighPressure=true+fire event. DecreasePressure(): -=decay clamped to 0; if _isHighPressure&amp;&amp;&lt;threshold→_isHighPressure=false+fire event. Reset(): _pressure=0;_isHighPressure=false (silent). Properties: Pressure/IsHighPressure/HighPressureThreshold/PressureIncrement/PressureDecay. Refresh(): null catalog/playerAchievements→hide panel; FindNextIncomplete: linear scan, first non-unlocked entry; null (all done)→_achievementNameLabel="All Complete!"+hide panel; else: current=GetCurrentProgress(def); ratio=Clamp01(current/target); set name/progress labels; set slider; show panel. Runtime: KillFeedEntry[] _entries (pre-allocated OnEnable), _head int, _count int. OnEnable allocates buffer+resets. Add(entry): write at _head; advance _head%max; increment _count up to max; raise _onFeedUpdated. Clear(): _count=0;_head=0; raise _onFeedUpdated. GetEntry(index): newest-first via (_head-1-index)%max; out-of-range→default. EnsureBuffer() defensive init. MaxEntries/Count properties. OnValidate clamps. | T134 | EnergySystemSO — runtime SO tracking current/max energy, recharge rate, events; Consume/Recharge/LoadSnapshot/Reset/TakeSnapshot API; OnEnable fills to max | 88 | **Done** | EnergySystemSO SO (Core, CreateAssetMenu "BattleRobots/Core/EnergySystem"): _maxEnergy [Min(1f)] default 100; _rechargeRate [Min(0f)] default 10; optional _onEnergyChanged/_onEnergyDepleted/_onEnergyFull VoidGameEvent; runtime _currentEnergy float (not serialized); OnEnable fills _currentEnergy=_maxEnergy (no events). Properties: CurrentEnergy/MaxEnergy/RechargeRate float; EnergyRatio float (safe div, 0 when max≤0). Consume(float amount): amount<0→false; currentEnergy<amount→false; subtract; raise _onEnergyChanged; if currentEnergy≤0 raise _onEnergyDepleted; return true. Recharge(float deltaTime): ≤0 or already full→return; add rechargeRate×dt; raise _onEnergyChanged; if newly full raise _onEnergyFull. LoadSnapshot(float): Clamp(value,0,max) — bootstrapper-safe, no events. TakeSnapshot()→float. Reset(): fill to max + raise _onEnergyChanged. 20 new EditMode tests: EnergySystemSOTests (FreshInstance×4; Consume-negative/sufficient/insufficient/exact/reduces/fires-changed/fires-depleted×7; Recharge-zeroDt/negDt/increases/caps/fires-full×5; LoadSnapshot-clamps-max/clamps-zero×2; TakeSnapshot×1; Reset-fills×1). Total: 2474 tests across 178 test files. M13 started. |

ShowStep(index): null _sequence or index >= Count → FinishTutorial(); else set header/body text; _tutorialPanel.SetActive(true). AdvanceStep(): null _progress or _sequence → no-op; MarkStepComplete(Steps[index].StepId); _currentIndex++; ShowStep(_currentIndex). SkipAll(): _progress?.Complete(); load→mutate(tutorialComplete=true)→Save when _progress non-null; HideTutorial(). | T117 | ScoreHistorySO + ScoreHistoryController — chronological rolling window of the last N match scores (oldest→newest) with AverageScore and TrendDelta, displayed on any stats panel as summary labels and an optional bar list | 74 | **Done** | ScoreHistorySO SO (Core, CreateAssetMenu "BattleRobots/Core/ScoreHistory"): _maxEntries [Range(5,50)] default 20; _onHistoryUpdated VoidGameEvent optional; _scores List<int> runtime-only (not serialized). Scores IReadOnlyList<int> (chronological); MaxEntries int. AverageScore float — safe-division, 0f when empty. TrendDelta int — last-first when Count≥2, else 0 (positive=improving, negative=declining). Record(int score): append; evict front when count>MaxEntries; fire _onHistoryUpdated. LoadSnapshot(List<int>): null→clear; keep tail (most-recent) entries up to MaxEntries; bootstrapper-safe (no event). TakeSnapshot()→List<int>: shallow copy in chronological order. Reset(): clear (no event). ScoreHistoryController MB (BattleRobots.UI, DisallowMultipleComponent): optional _scoreHistory/ScoreHistorySO (Data); _onHistoryUpdated/VoidGameEvent (In); _averageText/Text, _trendText/Text (Summary Labels optional); _listContainer/Transform, _barPrefab/GameObject (Bar List optional). Refresh(): null _scoreHistory → fallback text ("Avg: —", "±0"); _averageText.text="Avg: "+RoundToInt(AverageScore); _trendText.text=FormatTrend(TrendDelta); destroy old bar children; null _listContainer or _barPrefab→return; foreach score: Instantiate _barPrefab; Texts[0]=score.ToString(); Sliders[0].value=Clamp01(score/1000f). MatchLeaderboardSO SO (Core, CreateAssetMenu "BattleRobots/Core/MatchLeaderboard"): _maxEntries [Range(5,20)] default 10; _onLeaderboardUpdated VoidGameEvent optional; _entries List<LeaderboardEntry> runtime-only (not serialized). Entries IReadOnlyList<LeaderboardEntry>; MaxEntries int. Submit(MatchResultSO result, string opponentName="", int arenaIndex=0)→bool: null result→false/no-event; compute score via MatchScoreCalculator.Calculate(result); build LeaderboardEntry with DateTime.UtcNow.ToString("o") timestamp; insert at descending-score position; evict tail when count>MaxEntries; fire _onLeaderboardUpdated; return true. LoadSnapshot(List<LeaderboardEntry>): null→clear; defensive copy; sort descending; truncate to MaxEntries; bootstrapper-safe (no event). TakeSnapshot()→List<LeaderboardEntry>: deep copy. Reset(): clear (no event). | T113 | TournamentGatingEvaluator + TournamentConfig/Manager/Controller patch — tier/rating-gated tournament entry closing the meta-loop cycle (build rating → tier → unlock tournaments) | 85 | **Done** | TournamentConfig patched (Core): `_requiredTier RobotTierLevel` (default Unranked) + `_minRating int [Min(0)]` (default 0); `RequiredTier`/`MinRating` read-only properties. Backwards-compatible: Unranked + 0 = no gating on existing assets. TournamentGatingEvaluator static class (Core): `IsUnlocked(TournamentConfig, BuildRatingSO, RobotTierConfig)→bool` — null config→true; delegates tier check to RobotTierEvaluator.MeetsTierRequirement + raw rating check; both gates must pass; zero alloc. `GetLockReason(...)→string` — tier checked first; returns formatted reason string or string.Empty when unlocked; zero alloc on unlocked path. TournamentManager patched (Core): optional `_buildRating BuildRatingSO` + `_tierConfig RobotTierConfig` fields under "Tier Gating (optional)" header; `StartTournament()` guards with `TournamentGatingEvaluator.IsUnlocked` when `_buildRating` non-null — null _buildRating bypasses gate (backwards-compatible); blocked entry logs warning and returns before deducting entry fee. TournamentController patched (BattleRobots.UI): optional `_buildRating BuildRatingSO`, `_tierConfig RobotTierConfig`, `_onRatingChanged IntGameEvent` (In), `_lockReasonText Text` fields under "Tier Gating (optional)" header; `_onRatingChangedDelegate Action<int>` cached in Awake (`_ => Refresh()`); OnEnable subscribes + OnDisable unsubscribes; `Refresh()` calls `IsUnlocked` — `_enterButton.interactable = !active && isUnlocked`; `_lockReasonText` shown/hidden with GetLockReason text when locked. 30 new EditMode tests: TournamentGatingEvaluatorTests (22 — 4 TournamentConfig new fields; 9 IsUnlocked paths; 5 GetLockReason paths; 4 null/no-req paths) + TournamentManagerGatingTests (8 — null-buildRating-bypasses; requires-Bronze-unranked-blocked; requires-Bronze-Bronze-starts; tier-fail-no-fee; minRating-499-blocked; minRating-500-starts; rating-fail-no-fee; both-pass-activated-fee-deducted). RobotTierConfig SO (Core, CreateAssetMenu "BattleRobots/Core/RobotTierConfig"): _thresholds List<TierThresholdEntry>; Thresholds IReadOnlyList; GetTier(int rating)→RobotTierLevel — empty list→Unranked; scans all entries, returns tier with highest enum value whose ratingThreshold≤rating; rating below all thresholds→Unranked; zero alloc; GetDisplayName(RobotTierLevel)→string — linear scan, fallback to tier.ToString() on no match or empty displayName; GetTierColor(RobotTierLevel)→Color — linear scan, fallback to Color.white; OnValidate warns duplicate tier enum values. RobotStatsAggregator.ApplySynergies(RobotCombatStats baseStats, IReadOnlyList<PartSynergyEntry> activeSynergies)→RobotCombatStats static method (Core): null/empty list→returns baseStats unchanged (zero alloc); iterates active synergies (null entries skipped); sums all healthBonus additively + all speedMultiplierBonus additively + all damageMultiplierBonus additively + all armorBonus additively; applies: finalHealth=base+ΣhealthBonus; finalSpeed=base×(1+Σspeed); finalDamage=base×(1+Σdamage); finalArmor=Clamp(base+ΣarmorBonus,0,100); returns new RobotCombatStats struct. CombatStatsApplicator patched (Physics): three new optional inspector fields under "Build Synergies (optional)" header — _synergyConfig PartSynergyConfig, _playerLoadout PlayerLoadout, _shopCatalog ShopCatalog; ApplyStats() reordered: (1) Compute base stats, (2) ApplySynergies when all three synergy fields assigned — applied BEFORE health init so HP bonuses are included in InitForMatch, (3) health init with post-synergy TotalMaxHealth, (4) modifier multipliers, (5) push to locomotion/AI/armor; fully null-safe and backwards-compatible (all three null = no synergy application). 16 new EditMode tests: RobotStatsAggregatorSynergyTests (10 — ApplySynergies_NullSynergies_ReturnsBaseStatsUnchanged; EmptySynergies_ReturnsBaseStatsUnchanged; SingleSynergy_AppliesHealthBonus; SingleSynergy_AppliesArmorBonus; SingleSynergy_AppliesSpeedBonus; SingleSynergy_AppliesDamageBonus; MultipleSynergies_BonusesStackAdditively; ZeroBonusFields_StatsUnchanged; ArmorBonusExceedsCap_ClampedAt100; NullEntryInList_IsSkippedNoThrow) + CombatStatsApplicatorSynergyTests (6 — ApplyStats_NullSynergyConfig_DoesNotThrow; ApplyStats_NullPlayerLoadout_DoesNotThrow; ApplyStats_NullShopCatalog_DoesNotThrow; ApplyStats_WithActiveSynergy_AppliesHealthBonus; ApplyStats_WithActiveSynergy_AppliesSpeedBonus; ApplyStats_NoActiveSynergies_BaseStatsUnchanged). | T031 | GameBootstrapper first-launch wallet bug fix | 90 | **Done** | Bug: `walletBalance > 0` guard caused new players to start with 0 credits instead of 500 (_playerWallet.Balance is 0 before Reset() is ever called). Correctly handles returning player with legitimately empty wallet. |

| T091 | MatchModifierSO + MatchModifierCatalogSO + SelectedModifierSO + MatchModifierSelectionController — pre-match rule modifier system | 90 | **Done** | MatchModifierType enum (6 values: Standard/DoubleRewards/ExtendedTime/ShortTime/FragileArmor/Overdrive). MatchModifierSO SO (Core, CreateAssetMenu "BattleRobots/Match/MatchModifier"): DisplayName/Description; RewardMultiplier float ≥0.1 (default 1.0); TimeMultiplier float ≥0.1 (default 1.0); ArmorMultiplier float ≥0 (default 1.0); SpeedMultiplier float ≥0.1 (default 1.0); OnValidate clamps all multipliers to minimums + warns empty DisplayName. MatchModifierCatalogSO SO (Core, CreateAssetMenu "BattleRobots/Match/MatchModifierCatalog"): immutable IReadOnlyList<MatchModifierSO>; OnValidate warns null entries. SelectedModifierSO (Core, CreateAssetMenu "BattleRobots/Match/SelectedModifier"): mutable runtime SO; Select(modifier) sets Current+HasSelection+fires VoidGameEvent; Reset() clears silently; CurrentDisplayName → "Standard" fallback when unset/null. MatchModifierSelectionController MB (BattleRobots.UI): mirrors DifficultySelectionController pattern — prev/next wrap-around, optional _nameLabel+_descriptionLabel Text labels, ApplySelection on OnEnable, cached UnityAction delegates, no Update, no Physics refs. MatchManager patched: optional _selectedModifier field; HandleMatchStarted multiplies _timeRemaining by Current.TimeMultiplier after base duration resolved; caches _activeRoundDuration (post-modifier) to fix elapsed computation bug when time multiplier != 1; EndMatch applies Current.RewardMultiplier to totalReward after streak bonus (streak × modifier stacking). CombatStatsApplicator patched: optional _selectedModifier field; ApplyStats() scales base speed by Current.SpeedMultiplier and armor rating by Current.ArmorMultiplier (Mathf.Clamp [0,100]) before pushing to locomotion/DamageReceiver. All integrations fully null-safe; backwards-compatible (null _selectedModifier = multipliers all 1). MatchModifierSOTests (13 tests): 7 fresh-instance defaults; MatchModifierType_HasExactlySixValues; AllModifierTypes_CanBeAssignedAndRead; 4 reflection round-trips. MatchModifierCatalogSOTests (6 tests): not-null/empty/IReadOnlyList; count 1/2; insertion order. SelectedModifierSOTests (14 tests): 3 fresh-instance defaults; Select 8 paths (state/event/null/idempotent); Reset 3 paths (clears+silent). MatchModifierSelectionControllerTests (16 tests): initial index=0; NextModifier null/empty/increment/wrap/cycle; PreviousModifier null/empty/wrap/decrement; NextThenPrev returns start; SO write verification (next/prev); null SO no-throw. Total tests: 1292 across 97 files. |

OnEnable zeros state. AddMomentum(float): ≤0 ignored; clamp to max; raise _onMomentumChanged; fires _onMomentumFull on below→max transition. | T134 — EnergySystemSO | 2026-04-13 | EnergySystemSO SO (Core, CreateAssetMenu "BattleRobots/Core/EnergySystem"): _maxEnergy [Min(1f)] default 100; _rechargeRate [Min(0f)] default 10; optional _onEnergyChanged/_onEnergyDepleted/_onEnergyFull VoidGameEvent; runtime _currentEnergy float (not serialized). OnEnable fills _currentEnergy=_maxEnergy (no events). Properties: CurrentEnergy/MaxEnergy/RechargeRate/EnergyRatio (safe div). Consume(float): <0→false; insufficient→false; subtract; raise _onEnergyChanged; if ≤0 raise _onEnergyDepleted; return true. Recharge(float dt): ≤0 or full→no-op; add rate×dt capped at max; raise _onEnergyChanged; if newly full raise _onEnergyFull. LoadSnapshot(float): Clamp(0,max) — bootstrapper-safe, no events. TakeSnapshot()→float. Reset(): fill to max + raise _onEnergyChanged. 20 new EditMode tests: EnergySystemSOTests (FreshInstance×4; Consume×7; Recharge×5; LoadSnapshot×2; TakeSnapshot×1; Reset×1). Total: 2474 tests across 178 test files. M13 started. |

ArenaSelectionController MB (UI): prev/next wrap-around cycling, ApplySelection on OnEnable, cached delegates, no Update. ArenaManager patched: optional _selectedArena field; resolves activeConfig from preset when HasSelection+non-null config, else falls back to inspector _arenaConfig (backwards-compatible). MatchManager patched: optional _selectedArena field; writes record.arenaIndex from Current.config.ArenaIndex — closes the gap where MatchRecord.arenaIndex was defined but never populated. 9+12+14+4=39 new tests. Total tests: 968 across 74 files. |
| T094 — MatchScoreCalculator + PersonalBestSO + PersonalBestController | 2026-04-11 | Per-match numeric scoring + personal best tracking. MatchScoreCalculator static class (Core): formula base(1000/100) + time-bonus(win-only, max(0,floor(600−t×5))) + damageDone×2 − damageTaken + bonusEarned×3; clamped to 0. PersonalBestSO SO (Core): CurrentScore/BestScore/IsNewBest; Submit() strict-greater-than check + optional event channels; LoadSnapshot bootstrapper-safe; Reset silent. SaveData.personalBestScore (backwards-compat). GameBootstrapper + MatchManager patched (Submit before _onMatchEnded; persist in same Save() call). PersonalBestController MB (BattleRobots.UI): subscribes _onMatchEnded; Refresh() drives _scoreText/_bestScoreText/_newBestPanel; cached delegate; no Update. 44 new tests: MatchScoreCalculatorTests (13) + PersonalBestSOTests (23) + PersonalBestControllerTests (8). Total tests: 1418 across 110 files. |
| T080 — CountdownManager + MatchCountdownController | 2026-04-11 | CountdownManager MB (BattleRobots.Core): pre-match 3-2-1-FIGHT countdown; fires IntGameEvent ticks (_countdownFrom downto 1), then raises _onCountdownComplete + _matchStartedEvent. Three execution paths: (1) _countdownFrom≤0 → immediate, (2) _countdownFrom>0 + both delays==0 → synchronous same-frame (testable in EditMode), (3) any delay>0 → coroutine. Drop-in replacement for MatchStarter. MatchCountdownController MB (BattleRobots.UI): subscribes to tick+complete channels; shows/hides _countdownPanel; sets _countdownText to count or "FIGHT!"; WaitForSecondsRealtime hide coroutine. All delegates cached in Awake (zero alloc). CountdownManagerTests (15 tests): null guard, zero-countdown-zero-delay (complete+start+no-ticks), positive-countdown-zero-delay ticks descending/count/matchStarted-after/complete-before-start/single/coroutine-no-fire-in-EditMode, null optional events, default value reflection. MatchCountdownControllerTests (9 tests): enable/disable null channels, tick null/panel/text, complete null/text-FIGHT!, OnDisable unregisters tick+complete callbacks. Total tests: 929 across 71 files. |

- T362: `ZoneControlReplayAnnotationSO` (Core SO) — `_maxAnnotations [Min(1)]` default 10; `AddAnnotation(float,string)` null/empty note→return; evicts oldest when full; fires `_onAnnotationAdded`; `GetAnnotations()→IReadOnlyList`; `Reset()` clears silently; `OnEnable→Reset`; `AnnotationCount/MaxAnnotations` properties. `ZoneControlReplayAnnotationController` (UI MB) — `_onZoneCaptured→HandleZoneCaptured→AddAnnotation+Refresh`; `_onMatchStarted→HandleMatchStarted→Reset+Refresh`; `_onAnnotationAdded→Refresh`; `Refresh()`: null→hide; show+countLabel+latestLabel; DisallowMultipleComponent. 12 tests.
- T363: `ZoneControlDifficultyRampSO` (Core SO) — `_rampDuration [Min(1f)]` default 120f; `_startDifficulty/_endDifficulty [Range(0,1)]`; `StartRamp()` arms ramp; `Tick(dt)` advances elapsed+lerps; `Reset()` disarms silently; `OnEnable→Reset`; `CurrentDifficulty/ElapsedTime/IsActive` properties. `ZoneControlDifficultyRampController` (UI MB) — `_onMatchStarted→StartRamp`; `_onMatchEnded→Reset`; `_onDifficultyChanged→Refresh`; `Update→Tick`; `Refresh()`: null→hide; show+"Difficulty: F2"; DisallowMultipleComponent. 12 tests.
- T364: `ZoneControlMatchQualitySO` (Core SO) — normalised weighted quality score [0–100] from zones/pace/rating inputs; `ComputeQuality(int,float,int)` normalises+weights+rounds+fires `_onQualityComputed`; `Reset()` clears `_lastQuality`; `OnEnable→Reset`. `ZoneControlMatchQualityController` (UI MB) — `_onMatchEnded→HandleMatchEnded→ComputeQuality+Refresh`; `_onQualityComputed→Refresh`; `Refresh()`: null→hide; "Quality: N/100"; DisallowMultipleComponent. 13 tests.
- T365: `ZoneControlMomentumTrackerSO` (Core SO) — sliding-window capture burst tracker; `RecordCapture(float)` prunes+adds+evaluates; `Tick(float)` prunes+evaluates; `EvaluateBurst()` fires `_onBurstDetected` on false→true and `_onBurstEnded` on true→false; `Reset()` clears silently; `OnEnable→Reset`. `ZoneControlMomentumTrackerController` (UI MB) — `_onZoneCaptured→RecordCapture+Refresh`; `_onMatchStarted→Reset+Refresh`; `_onBurstDetected/_onBurstEnded→Refresh`; `Update→Tick`; `Refresh()`: null→hide; "BURST!"/"Normal"+"Captures: N"; DisallowMultipleComponent. 13 tests.

**M76 Zone Control Bot Fatigue, Match Fairness, Performance Metrics &amp; Challenge Streak — ALL TASKS COMPLETE (T358–T361).**
- T358: `ZoneControlFatigueSystemSO` (Core SO) — `_fatigueThreshold [Min(1)]` default 3; `_fatigueDelay [Min(0.1f)]` default 5f; `RecordBotCapture()` increments `_consecutiveCaptures`; on first reaching threshold → `_isFatigued=true` + fire `_onFatigueTriggered`; `RecoverFromFatigue()` resets counter + clears flag + fires `_onFatigueRecovered` when was fatigued; `Reset()` silent; `OnEnable→Reset`. `ZoneControlFatigueSystemController` (UI MB) — `_onBotZoneCaptured→HandleBotCapture→RecordBotCapture+Refresh`; `_onMatchStarted→HandleMatchStarted→Reset+Refresh`; `_onFatigueTriggered/_onFatigueRecovered→Refresh`; `Refresh()`: null→hide; show + status + capture count labels; DisallowMultipleComponent. 14 tests.
- T359: `ZoneControlMatchFairnessSO` (Core SO) — `_gapThreshold [Min(1)]` default 5; `_catchUpBonusPerZone [Min(0)]` default 10; `EvaluateFairness(playerScore,botScore)` activates/deactivates catch-up with idempotency; `GetCatchUpBonus()` returns bonus when active else 0; `Reset()` silent; `OnEnable→Reset`. `ZoneControlMatchFairnessController` (UI MB) — reads `scoreboardSO` scores on `_onScoreboardUpdated`; `_onMatchStarted→Reset+Refresh`; `Refresh()`: status "Catch-Up Active!"/"Fair Match" + bonus label; DisallowMultipleComponent. 13 tests.
- T360: `ZoneControlPerformanceMetricsSO` (Core SO) — `RecordCapture/RecordAttempt` counts; `FinalizeMetrics(duration)` idempotent; `CaptureAccuracy/CaptureRate` computed props; `GetPerformanceGrade()` returns "S/A/B/C/D" by combined thresholds; `Reset()` silent. `ZoneControlPerformanceMetricsController` (UI MB) — `_onZoneCaptured/_onCaptureAttempted/_onMatchEnded/_onMatchStarted/_onMetricsFinalized`; tracks `_matchStartTime`; `Refresh()`: grade + accuracy % + rate labels; DisallowMultipleComponent. 15 tests.
- T361: `ZoneControlChallengeStreakSO` (Core SO) — `_rewardBase [Min(0)]` default 50; `_rewardPerStreak [Min(0)]` default 25; `RecordCompletion()` increments streak + accumulates total rewards + fires `_onStreakIncreased`; `RecordFailure()` resets streak + fires `_onStreakBroken` (idempotent at 0); `GetCurrentReward()=base+streak*per`; `Reset()` silent. `ZoneControlChallengeStreakController` (UI MB) — `_onChallengeComplete→HandleChallengeComplete→RecordCompletion+wallet.AddFunds+Refresh`; `_onChallengeFailed→HandleChallengeFailed→RecordFailure+Refresh`; streak/reward/total labels; DisallowMultipleComponent. 13 tests.

**M75 Zone Control Prestige Track, Scout Report, Rivalry &amp; Economy Boost — ALL TASKS COMPLETE (T354–T357).**
- T354: `ZoneControlPrestigeTrackSO` (Core SO) — `_tierThresholds int[]` default {100,500,1000,5000}; `_tierTitles string[]` default {"Novice","Expert","Master","Legend"}; `AddCaptures(int)` ignores ≤0, accumulates, calls `EvaluateTiers()` — loop advances `_currentTierIndex` while total ≥ threshold and fires `_onPrestigeGranted` per tier; `GetPrestigeTitle()` returns title at current tier index (clamped); `Reset()` silent; `OnEnable→Reset`; `TotalCaptures/CurrentTierIndex` properties. `ZoneControlPrestigeTrackController` (UI MB) — `_onMatchEnded→HandleMatchEnded→AddCaptures(summarySO.TotalZonesCaptured)+Refresh`; `_onPrestigeGranted→Refresh`; `Refresh()`: null→hide panel; show+`_titleLabel=GetPrestigeTitle()`+`_captureLabel="Captures: N"`; DisallowMultipleComponent. 12 tests.
- T355: `ZoneControlBotPattern enum` (Core): `Random=0/Systematic=1`. `ZoneControlScoutReportSO` (Core SO) — `_systematicThreshold [Min(0.1f)]` default 1.0f; `UpdateReport(int,float)` no-op when duration≤0; computes rate=captures/(duration/60); pattern=rate≥threshold→Systematic; `_isGenerated=true`; fires `_onReportGenerated`; `GetSummary()` "No data" or "Bot Rate: F1/min - Pattern"; `Reset()` silent; `OnEnable→Reset`; `BotCaptureRate/BotPattern/IsGenerated/SystematicThreshold` properties. `ZoneControlScoutReportController` (UI MB) — `_onMatchStarted→HandleMatchStarted→_botCaptureCount=0+_matchStartTime=Time.time+Reset+Refresh`; `_onMatchEnded→HandleMatchEnded→UpdateReport(_botCaptureCount,elapsed)+Refresh`; `_onReportGenerated→Refresh`; `RecordBotCapture()` increments `_botCaptureCount`; `Refresh()`: null→hide; show+label=GetSummary(); DisallowMultipleComponent. 12 tests.
- T356: `ZoneControlRivalrySO` (Core SO) — `_playerWins/_botWins` runtime int; `RecordResult(bool playerWon)` increments appropriate counter+fires `_onRivalryUpdated`; `RivalryDescription()` "You lead N-M"/"Tied"/"Bot leads N-M"; `WinsDelta=playerWins-botWins`; `Reset()` silent; `OnEnable→Reset`. `ZoneControlRivalryController` (UI MB) — `_onMatchEnded→HandleMatchEnded→RecordResult(scoreboardSO.PlayerScore>GetBotScore(0))+Refresh`; `_onRivalryUpdated→Refresh`; `Refresh()`: null→hide panel; show+label=RivalryDescription(); rivalryBar.value=playerWins/total (0.5 when no matches); DisallowMultipleComponent. 12 tests.
- T357: `ZoneControlEconomyBoostSO` (Core SO) — `_boostMultiplier [Min(1f)]` default 2f; `_boostDuration [Min(1f)]` default 300f; `ActivateBoost()` sets remaining=duration+_isActive=true+fires `_onBoostActivated`; `Tick(dt)` no-ops when inactive, decrements, fires `_onBoostExpired` on expiry; `ApplyBoost(int)` returns RoundToInt(amount*multiplier) when active else passthrough; `BoostProgress=remaining/duration` [0,1] when active else 0; `Reset()` silent; `OnEnable→Reset`. `ZoneControlEconomyBoostController` (UI MB) — `_onBoostActivated/_onBoostExpired→Refresh`; `Update→Tick+Refresh` when active; `Refresh()`: null→hide panel; show+label="Nx Economy Active: M:SS"/label="No Boost"+progressBar.value=BoostProgress; DisallowMultipleComponent. 12 tests.

**M74 Zone Control Power-Up Catalog, Match Feed, Career Goal &amp; Seasonal Bonus — ALL TASKS COMPLETE (T350–T353).**
- T350: `ZoneControlPowerUpCatalogSO` (Core SO) — `_powerUps ZoneControlPowerUpSO[]`; `SelectRandom()` picks random entry, stores `_lastSelectedIndex`, fires `_onSpawnRequested`, returns selected SO (null when empty); `GetPowerUp(int)` null-safe bounds-checked; `Reset()` sets `_lastSelectedIndex=-1` silently; `OnEnable→Reset`; `EntryCount/LastSelectedIndex` properties. `ZoneControlPowerUpCatalogController` (Core MB) — `_onSpawnPowerUp→HandleSpawnPowerUp→_catalogSO?.SelectRandom()`; `_onMatchStarted→HandleMatchStarted→_catalogSO?.Reset()`; DisallowMultipleComponent. 12 tests.
- T351: `ZoneControlFeedEventType enum` (Core): `ZoneCaptured=0/PowerUpCollected=1/BotCapture=2/VictoryAchieved=3`. `ZoneControlMatchFeedEntry [Serializable] sealed class`: `Timestamp/Type/Message`. `ZoneControlMatchFeedSO` (Core SO) — `_maxEntries [Min(1)]` default 10; `AddEntry(float,type,string)` evicts oldest when full, null message→Empty, fires `_onFeedUpdated`; `Reset()` clears silently; `OnEnable→Reset`; `EntryCount/MaxEntries/Entries (IReadOnlyList)` properties. `ZoneControlMatchFeedController` (UI MB) — subscribes 4 event channels (zone captured/power-up collected/bot capture/victory achieved) → `AddEntry` with `Time.time`+type+label; `_onMatchStarted→HandleMatchStarted→Reset+Refresh`; `_onFeedUpdated→Refresh`; `Refresh()`: null SO→hide panel; destroy stale rows; empty→emptyLabel; spawn rows newest-first (`"{F1}s"` + message); DisallowMultipleComponent. 12 tests.
- T352: `ZoneControlCareerGoalType enum` (Core): `TotalCaptures=0/TotalWins=1/TotalMatches=2`. `ZoneControlCareerGoalSO` (Core SO) — `_goalType/_targetValue [Min(1)]` default 50; `AddProgress(int)` clamps≥0, accumulates, fires `_onGoalAchieved` on first crossing (idempotent); `LoadSnapshot(int,bool)` bootstrapper-safe; `TakeSnapshot()→(int,bool)`; `Reset()` silent; `OnEnable→Reset`; `GoalType/TargetValue/AccumulatedValue/IsAchieved/Progress (Clamp01)` properties. `ZoneControlCareerGoalController` (UI MB) — `_onMatchEnded→HandleMatchEnded`: reads metric per GoalType (TotalCaptures→summarySO?.TotalZonesCaptured; TotalWins→1 if profileSO has wins; TotalMatches→1)+`AddProgress`+Refresh; `_onGoalAchieved→Refresh`; `Refresh()`: null SO→hide; show+progressBar.value+label ("N% Complete"/"Goal Achieved!")+completeBadge.SetActive; DisallowMultipleComponent. 12 tests.
- T353: `ZoneControlSeasonalBonusSO` (Core SO) — `_bronzeBonus/_silverBonus/_goldBonus/_platinumBonus [Min(0)]` defaults 100/250/500/1000; `GetBonusForDivision(ZoneControlLeagueDivision)` switch; `AwardBonus(division)` calculates+stores `_lastBonusAmount`+accumulates `_totalBonusAwarded`+fires `_onBonusAwarded`; `Reset()` silent; `OnEnable→Reset`; `BronzeBonus/SilverBonus/GoldBonus/PlatinumBonus/TotalBonusAwarded/LastBonusAmount` properties. `ZoneControlSeasonalBonusController` (UI MB) — `_onSeasonEnded→HandleSeasonEnded`: null guard; reads `leagueSO?.CurrentDivision??Bronze`; `AwardBonus`; `wallet?.AddFunds(LastBonusAmount)`; Refresh; `_onBonusAwarded→Refresh`; `Refresh()`: null→hide; show+`_bonusLabel="Last Bonus: N"`+`_totalLabel="Total Earned: N"`; DisallowMultipleComponent. 12 tests.

- T345: `ZoneControlTieBreakSO` (Core SO) — `ZoneControlTieBreakType` enum `SuddenDeath/CaptureTarget/TimeAdvantage`; `_captureTargetBonus [Min(1)]` default 3; `EvaluateTie(int,int)`: equal+!active→`_isActive=true`+fire `_onTieBreakTriggered`; unequal+active→`_isActive=false`; same state→no-op; `TieBreakDescription` switch; `Reset()` clears silently. `ZoneControlTieBreakController` (UI MB) — `_onMatchEnded→HandleMatchEnded→EvaluateTie+Refresh`; `_onTieBreakTriggered→Refresh`; `_onMatchStarted→HandleMatchStarted→Reset+Refresh`; `Refresh()`: null/!IsActive→hide; else show+`label=TieBreakDescription`; DisallowMultipleComponent. 12 tests.

**M67 Zone Control Adaptive Spawn, Heatmap History, Zone Lock HUD &amp; Alert System — ALL TASKS COMPLETE (T322–T325).**
- T322: `ZoneControlAdaptiveSpawnSO` (Core SO) — `_baseSpawnInterval [Min(0.1f)]` default 5f; `_pressureSpawnInterval [Min(0.1f)]` default 2f; `SetHighPressure(bool)` no-op when same, else set flag + fire `_onSpawnRateChanged`; `CurrentSpawnInterval` returns pressure or base interval; `Reset()` silent. `ZoneControlAdaptiveSpawnController` (Core MB) — `_onHighPressure→HandleHighPressure→SetHighPressure(true)`; `_onPressureRelieved→HandlePressureRelieved→SetHighPressure(false)`; `_onMatchStarted→HandleMatchStarted→Reset`; no Update; DisallowMultipleComponent. 12 tests.
- T323: `ZoneControlHeatmapHistorySO` (Core SO) — `_maxSnapshots [Min(1)]` default 5; `AddSnapshot(int[])` deep-copies + evicts oldest when full + fires `_onHistoryUpdated`; `GetLifetimeHeatLevel(int)` normalised 0–1 vs hottest zone across all snapshots; `GetLifetimeTotals()` per-zone sums; `Reset()` clears silently. `ZoneControlHeatmapHistoryController` (UI MB) — `HandleMatchEnded` reads `ZoneControlHeatmapSO` per-zone counts → `AddSnapshot` + Refresh; `_onHistoryUpdated→Refresh`; `_sessionBars[i].fillAmount=GetHeatLevel(i)`; `_lifetimeBars[i].fillAmount=GetLifetimeHeatLevel(i)`; panel hidden when historySO null. 12 tests.
- T324: `ZoneControlZoneLockHUDController` (UI MB) — `HandleZoneLocked→_isLocked=true+Refresh`; `HandleZoneUnlocked→_isLocked=false+Refresh`; `HandleMatchStarted→_isLocked=false+Refresh`; `Update→Tick(dt)`: locked+SO→Refresh; `Refresh()`: null SO→hide panel; IsLocked→`bar.value=LockProgress` + `label="Locked: {remaining:F1}s"`; else bar=0 + `label="Available"`; DisallowMultipleComponent. 12 tests.
- T325: `ZoneControlAlertSystemSO` (Core SO) — `EvaluateAlert(bool isHighPressure, ThreatLevel threat, bool hasDominance)`: critical = pressure && threat≥High && !dominance; fires `_onCriticalAlert` on false→true; fires `_onAlertCleared` on true→false; no-op when same; `Reset()` silent. `ZoneControlAlertSystemController` (UI MB) — subscribes `_onHighPressure/_onPressureRelieved/_onThreatChanged/_onDominanceChanged` → `EvaluateFromCurrentState` (reads all SOs, calls EvaluateAlert, re-raises out channels on transition, Refresh); `_onMatchStarted→HandleMatchStarted→Reset+Refresh`; `Refresh()`: null→hide; IsCritical→show panel + label="CRITICAL ALERT!". 12 tests.

**M68 Zone Control Capture Bonus, Round Result, Flank Detector &amp; Match Report — ALL TASKS COMPLETE (T326–T329).**
- T326: `ZoneControlCaptureBonusSO` (Core SO) — `_captureThreshold [Min(1)]` default 3; `_bonusPerCapture [Min(0)]` default 50; `EvaluateBonus(int)` returns `(count-threshold)*bonus` when above threshold, accumulates `TotalBonusAwarded`, fires `_onBonusAwarded`; `Reset()` silent. `ZoneControlCaptureBonusController` (UI MB) — `_onMatchEnded→HandleMatchEnded→EvaluateBonus(summarySO.TotalZonesCaptured)`; awards bonus to wallet; `_bonusLabel="Total Bonus: N"`; panel hidden when bonusSO null. 12 tests.
- T327: `ZoneControlRoundResultEntry [Serializable]` sealed class (Core) — PlayerWon/ScoreDelta. `ZoneControlRoundResultSO` (Core SO) — `_capacity [Min(1)]` default 5; ring buffer `_results`; `RecordResult(bool,int)` appends+prunes+fires `_onResultRecorded`; `WinRate` safe-division; `Reset()` silent. `ZoneControlRoundResultController` (UI MB) — `_onMatchEnded→HandleMatchEnded→RecordResult(playerWon,scoreDelta)`; reads `scoreboardSO.PlayerScore>GetBotScore(0)`; `_winsLabel="Wins: N"`; `_winRateLabel="Win Rate: N%"`; panel hidden when resultSO null. 12 tests.
- T328: `ZoneControlFlankDetectorSO` (Core SO) — `_flankWindow [Min(0.1f)]` default 3f; `_flankZoneCount [Min(2)]` default 2; `Dictionary<int,float> _recentCaptures`; `RecordBotCapture(int,float)` prunes stale entries then updates zone timestamp; fires `_onFlankDetected` when distinct active zones ≥ flankZoneCount; `Reset()` silent. `ZoneControlFlankDetectorController` (Core MB) — subscribes `_onBotZoneCaptured IntGameEvent→HandleBotZoneCaptured(int)→RecordBotCapture(index,Time.time)`; `_onMatchStarted→HandleMatchStarted→Reset`; DisallowMultipleComponent. 12 tests.
- T329: `ZoneControlMatchReportSO` (Core SO) — runtime fields: TotalZonesCaptured/MatchPressure/FinalThreatLevel/BestCombo/IsGenerated; `GenerateReport(summarySO,pressureSO,threatSO,comboSO)` null summarySO→no-op; populates from SOs; `_isGenerated=true`; fires `_onReportGenerated`; `Reset()` silent. `ZoneControlMatchReportController` (UI MB) — `_onMatchEnded→HandleMatchEnded→GenerateReport`; `Refresh()`: null SO or !IsGenerated→hide panel; else show; labels "Zones: N"/"Threat: X"/"Best Combo: N". 12 tests.

**M69 Zone Control Capture Streak Reward, Zone Presence, Match Pace Advisor &amp; Session Export — ALL TASKS COMPLETE (T330–T333).**
- T330: `ZoneControlCaptureStreakRewardSO` (Core SO) — `_streakMilestones int[]` default {3,5,10,20}; `_rewardPerMilestone [Min(0)]` default 100; `EvaluateStreak(int)` iterates pending milestones while streak≥milestone[i], increments `_unlockedMilestoneCount` + accumulates `_totalRewardAwarded` + fires `_onMilestoneReached` per tier; `NextMilestone` returns -1 when all crossed; `Reset()` silent. `ZoneControlCaptureStreakRewardController` (UI MB) — `_onStreakUpdated→HandleStreakUpdated`: reads `streakSO.CurrentStreak`, calls `EvaluateStreak`, credits `earned` difference to wallet, Refresh; `_onMatchStarted→HandleMatchStarted→Reset+Refresh`; `_onMilestoneReached→Refresh`; `_streakLabel="Streak: N"`; `_nextMilestoneLabel="Next: N"/"Max!"`; panel hidden when rewardSO null. 12 tests.
- T331: `ZoneControlZoneControllerCatalogSO` (Core SO) — `_zoneCount [Min(1)]` default 4; `bool[] _playerOwned` runtime array; `SetZoneController(int zoneIndex, bool playerOwned)` OOB-safe + fires `_onControlChanged`; `GetZoneController(int)` returns false for OOB; `PlayerOwnedCount` iterates array; `Reset()` re-allocates/clears silently. `ZoneControlZonePresenceController` (Core MB) — `_onPlayerZoneCaptured IntGameEvent→HandlePlayerZoneCaptured→SetZoneController(index, true)`; `_onBotZoneCaptured IntGameEvent→HandleBotZoneCaptured→SetZoneController(index, false)`; `_onMatchStarted→HandleMatchStarted→Reset`; DisallowMultipleComponent. 12 tests.
- T332: `ZoneControlPaceAdvice` enum (OnTarget/AheadOfPace/BehindPace). `ZoneControlMatchPaceSO` (Core SO) — `_targetPace [Min(0.1f)]` default 1.5; `_aheadThreshold/_behindThreshold [Min(0.1f)]` default 0.5; `EvaluatePace(float)`: rate≥target+ahead→AheadOfPace+fires `_onAheadOfPace`; rate≤target-behind→BehindPace+fires `_onBehindPace`; else OnTarget; caches `LastAdvice`; `Reset()` silent. `ZoneControlMatchPaceAdvisorController` (UI MB) — `_onPaceUpdated→HandlePaceUpdated→GetCapturesPerMinute(Time.time)+EvaluatePace+Refresh`; `_onMatchStarted→HandleMatchStarted→Reset+Refresh`; `Refresh()`: null paceSO||trackerSO→hide; `_adviceLabel="Ease off"/"Speed up"/"On target"` per LastAdvice; panel hidden when either SO null. 12 tests.
- T333: `ZoneControlSessionPayload [Serializable]` sealed class (TotalZonesCaptured/MatchesPlayed/BestCaptureStreak int; RatingHistory `List<int>`; RoundResultWins `List<bool>`). `ZoneControlSessionExportSO` (Core SO) — `ExportSession(summarySO, roundResultSO, ratingHistorySO)` populates payload from non-null SOs, `JsonUtility.ToJson`, caches `_lastExportJson`, fires `_onExportCompleted`; `LastExportJson` property; `Reset()` clears cache; `OnEnable→Reset()`. `ZoneControlSessionExportController` (Core MB) — `_autoExportOnSessionEnd bool` default true; `_onSessionEnded→HandleSessionEnded→TriggerExport()` when auto; `TriggerExport()→_exportSO?.ExportSession(...)`; DisallowMultipleComponent. 12 tests.

**M70 Zone Control Ownership Map HUD, Reward History, Zone Countdown &amp; Auto-Capture — ALL TASKS COMPLETE (T334–T337).**
- T334: `ZoneControlOwnershipMapHUDController` (UI MB) — reads `ZoneControlZoneControllerCatalogSO`; subscribes `_onControlChanged→Refresh`; `_zoneBadgeImages Image[]` colored `_playerColor`/`_botColor` per `GetZoneController(i)`; `_summaryLabel="Player Zones: N / Total"`; panel hidden when catalogSO null; DisallowMultipleComponent. 12 tests.
- T335: `ZoneControlRewardHistorySO` (Core SO) — ring buffer `List<int>` `_capacity` default 5; `AddReward(int)` clamps≥0 + prunes oldest + fires `_onHistoryUpdated`; `GetReward(int)` OOB-safe; `GetAverageReward()` safe-div; `Reset()` clears silent. `ZoneControlRewardHistoryController` (UI MB) — `_onMatchEnded→HandleMatchEnded→AddReward(captureBonusSO.TotalBonusAwarded)+Refresh`; `_onHistoryUpdated→Refresh`; `_rewardBars fillAmount=Clamp01(reward/maxDisplayReward)`; `_averageLabel="Avg Reward: N"`; panel hidden when historySO null. 12 tests.
- T336: `ZoneControlZoneCountdownSO` (Core SO) — `_duration [Min(0.1f)]` default 5f; `StartCountdown()` arms timer; `Tick(float)` decrements, fires `_onCountdownExpired` on expiry; `Progress=Clamp01(timer/duration)` while active, 0 idle; `Reset()` silent. `ZoneControlZoneCountdownController` (Core MB) — `Update→Tick`; `_onMatchStarted→HandleMatchStarted→StartCountdown`; DisallowMultipleComponent. 12 tests.
- T337: `ZoneControlAutoCaptureSO` (Core SO) — `_autoCaptureDuration [Min(0.1f)]` default 5f; `FireAutoCapture()` raises `_onAutoCapture`; `Reset()` bootstrapper-safe no-op. `ZoneControlAutoCaptureController` (Core MB) — `Tick(dt)`: cached `_isAccumulating` bool; player recapture resets immediately; fires `FireAutoCapture` once per duration-met event then resets; `_onMatchStarted→HandleMatchStarted→reset accumulator`; DisallowMultipleComponent. 12 tests.

**Next milestone (M71):** Suggested directions: (a) `ZoneControlCountdownHUDController` (UI MB) — subscribes `_onCountdownExpired`→`HandleExpired`; `Update→Tick`; while countdown is active reads `ZoneControlZoneCountdownSO.Progress` and sets `_progressBar.value`; label shows `"Ready in {remaining:F1}s"` while active / `"Available"` on expiry; (b) `ZoneControlAutoCaptureHUDController` (UI MB) — subscribes `_onAutoCapture→HandleAutoCapture`; reads `ZoneControlAutoCaptureController.AccumulatedTime/_autoCaptureSO.AutoCaptureDuration`; `_progressBar.value` shows danger level; label `"Bot Takeover: {remaining:F1}s"`; flashing panel when accumulating; (c) `ZoneControlRewardSummarySO + ZoneControlRewardSummaryController` (Core SO + UI MB) — aggregates per-session total rewards; `AddMatchReward(int)` accumulates; `TotalReward/MatchCount/AverageReward` properties; Controller subscribes `_onMatchEnded`→reads `rewardHistorySO.GetAverageReward()`; HUD shows total, average, and best-match reward; (d) `ZoneControlOwnershipSnapshotSO + ZoneControlOwnershipSnapshotController` (Core SO + Core MB) — captures `ZoneControlZoneControllerCatalogSO` ownership state as `bool[]` at match end; `TakeSnapshot(catalogSO)` clones ownership; `GetSnapshot(int)` OOB-safe; Controller subscribes `_onMatchEnded`→`TakeSnapshot`; fires `_onSnapshotTaken`.

**M66 Zone Control Heatmap, Match Pressure, Zone Lock &amp; Threat Assessment — ALL TASKS COMPLETE (T318–T321).**
- T318: `ZoneControlHeatmapSO` (Core SO) — `_zoneCount [Min(1)]` default 4; `RecordCapture(int zoneIndex)` OOB-safe, increments per-zone count, fires `_onHeatmapUpdated`; `GetHeatLevel(int)` normalised 0–1 vs `MaxCaptureCount`; `GetCaptureCount(int)` raw; `Reset()` re-allocates array silently. `ZoneControlHeatmapController` (UI MB) — `_onZoneCaptured IntGameEvent`→`HandleZoneCaptured(int)`→`RecordCapture`; `_onMatchStarted`→`Reset+Refresh`; `_onHeatmapUpdated`→`Refresh`; `_heatBars Image[]`: `fillAmount=GetHeatLevel(i)`; `color=Color.Lerp(_coldColor,_hotColor,heat)`. 12 tests.
- T319: `ZoneControlMatchPressureSO` (Core SO) — `_pressureIncrement/Decay [Range(0.1,1)]` defaults 0.25f; `_highPressureThreshold [Range(0.1,1)]` default 0.75f; `EvaluatePressure(bool botLeads)`: increase/decrease clamped to [0,1]; fires `_onHighPressure` on upward threshold crossing; fires `_onPressureRelieved` on downward crossing; `Reset()` silent. `ZoneControlMatchPressureController` (Core MB) — `HandleScoreboardUpdated`→`EvaluatePressure(_scoreboardSO.PlayerRank>1)`; `HandleMatchStarted`→`_pressureSO?.Reset()`. 12 tests.
- T320: `ZoneControlZoneLockSO` (Core SO) — `_lockDuration [Min(0.1f)]` default 5f; `LockZone()` sets `_isLocked=true` + resets timer + fires `_onZoneLocked`; `Tick(float dt)` decrements timer, fires `_onZoneUnlocked` on expiry; `LockProgress = _lockTimer/_lockDuration` (0 when unlocked); `Reset()` silent. `ZoneControlZoneLockController` (Core MB) — `Update→_lockSO?.Tick(Time.deltaTime)`; `_onZoneCaptured→HandleZoneCaptured→LockZone`; `_onMatchStarted→HandleMatchStarted→Reset`. 12 tests.
- T321: `ZoneControlThreatAssessmentSO` (Core SO) — `ThreatLevel` enum Low/Medium/High; `_mediumThreatRank [Min(2)]` default 2; `_highThreatRank [Min(2)]` default 3; `EvaluateThreat(int playerRank, bool hasDominance)`: rank≤1→Low; rank≥high&amp;&amp;!dom→High; rank≥medium→Medium; fires `_onThreatChanged` only on level change; `Reset()` →Low silent. `ZoneControlThreatAssessmentController` (UI MB) — `HandleScoreboardUpdated→EvaluateThreat(PlayerRank, dominanceSO?.HasDominance??false)`; `_onThreatChanged→Refresh`; `HandleMatchStarted→Reset+Refresh`; Refresh: label=`threat.ToString()`; badge colour per threat (low=green/medium=yellow/high=red). 12 tests.

**Next milestone (M67):** Suggested directions: (a) `ZoneControlAdaptiveSpawnSO + ZoneControlAdaptiveSpawnController` (Core SO + Core MB) — adjusts spawn rate of bot or loot based on `ZoneControlMatchPressureSO.IsHighPressure`; fires `_onSpawnRateChanged`; controller subscribes `_onHighPressure/_onPressureRelieved`→`SetSpawnRate`; (b) `ZoneControlHeatmapHistorySO + ZoneControlHeatmapHistoryController` (Core SO + UI MB) — aggregates `ZoneControlHeatmapSO` snapshots across multiple matches; `AddSnapshot(int[])` appends per-zone counts; `GetLifetimeHeatLevel(int zoneIndex)` normalised across all sessions; controller subscribes `_onMatchEnded`→snapshot; HUD shows session vs lifetime heat comparison; (c) `ZoneControlZoneLockHUDController` (UI MB) — subscribes `_onZoneLocked/_onZoneUnlocked`→`Refresh`; shows `_lockProgressBar.value = LockProgress`; `_lockLabel = "Locked: F1s"` / "Available"; panel hidden when not locked; (d) `ZoneControlAlertSystemSO + ZoneControlAlertSystemController` (Core SO + UI MB) — combines `ZoneControlMatchPressureSO.IsHighPressure` + `ZoneControlThreatAssessmentSO.CurrentThreat≥High` + `ZoneDominanceSO.HasDominance=false` to declare a `CriticalAlert`; fires `_onCriticalAlert VoidGameEvent`; controller subscribes all three channels and calls `EvaluateAlert`; HUD shows flashing alert banner.

**M65 Match Event Timeline, Bot Difficulty, Match Goal &amp; Bonus Chest — ALL TASKS COMPLETE (T314–T317).**
- T314: `ZoneControlMatchEventSO` (Core SO) — `ZoneControlMatchEventType` enum ZoneCaptured/HazardActivated/ComboReached; `ZoneControlMatchEvent [Serializable]`: Timestamp float/Type/Description string; bounded ring buffer `_maxEvents` default 20; `AddEvent(float,type,description)` evicts oldest when full, null description stored as Empty, fires `_onEventAdded`; `Reset()` clears silently; `Events IReadOnlyList`/`EventCount`/`MaxEvents`. `ZoneControlMatchEventController` (UI MB) — subscribes `_onZoneCaptured/_onHazardActivated/_onComboReached`→`AddEvent(Time.time, type, label)`; `_onEventAdded→Refresh`; `_onMatchStarted→HandleMatchStarted(Reset+Refresh)`; Refresh destroys stale rows + spawns newest-first (texts[0]="{F1}s", texts[1]=description). 12 tests.
- T315: `ZoneControlBotDifficultyProfileSO` (Core SO) — formula `Max(minimum, base - wave × reduction)`; `_baseCaptureInterval` default 10f; `_intervalReductionPerWave` default 0.5f; `_minimumInterval` default 2f; negative wave clamped to 0; `OnValidate` clamps minimum to [0.1, base]. `ZoneControlBotDifficultyController` (Core MB) — subscribes `_onWaveStarted→HandleWaveStarted`(reads `WaveManagerSO.CurrentWave`, computes interval from profile, sets `_isRunning=true`); `Update` accumulates dt → `RecordBotCapture(0)` on expiry; `HandleMatchStarted/Ended` disarm timer; all refs optional. 12 tests.
- T316: `ZoneControlMatchGoalSO` (Core SO) — `ZoneControlMatchGoalType` enum FirstToCaptures/MostZonesInTime; `IsGoalMet(int playerScore, int timeElapsed)`: FC → playerScore≥captureTarget; MZ → timeElapsed≥(int)timeLimitSeconds; `GoalDescription` property; `OnValidate` clamps. `ZoneControlMatchGoalController` (UI MB) — `HandleScoreboardUpdated`: null goalSO or already met → return; evaluates goal idempotently; first-met → `_isGoalMet=true + _onGoalMet?.Raise() + Refresh`; `HandleMatchStarted` resets flag + records `_matchStartTime = Time.time`; `Refresh` shows `GoalDescription`. 12 tests.
- T317: `ZoneControlBonusChestSO` (Core SO) — `_captureInterval [Min(1)]` default 5; `CheckChest(int)`: integer division tracks `_lastMilestone`; fires `_onChestSpawned` + increments `_totalChests` per newly crossed interval (handles multi-interval jumps); `Reset()` silently zeros. `ZoneControlBonusChestController` (UI MB) — `HandlePlayerCaptured` increments `_captureCount + CheckChest`; `HandleMatchStarted` resets count + SO; `Refresh` shows "Next chest: N". 12 tests.

**Next milestone (M66):** Suggested directions: (a) `ZoneControlHeatmapSO + ZoneControlHeatmapController` (Core SO + UI MB) — tracks frequency of zone captures per zone index across a session; `RecordCapture(int zoneIndex)` increments per-zone count; `GetHeatLevel(int)` normalised 0–1; HUD shows a bar per zone coloured by heat; (b) `ZoneControlMatchPressureSO + ZoneControlMatchPressureController` (Core SO + Core MB) — accumulates a pressure float when bots lead on score; fires `_onHighPressure`/`_onPressureRelieved`; pressure decays if player re-takes lead; controller subscribes `_onScoreboardUpdated`; (c) `ZoneControlZoneLockSO + ZoneControlZoneLockController` (Core SO + Core MB) — temporarily locks a zone from capture for `_lockDuration` seconds after it changes hands; `LockZone()/IsLocked/LockProgress`; controller subscribes `_onZoneCaptured→LockZone`; Update ticks unlock timer; (d) `ZoneControlThreatAssessmentSO + ZoneControlThreatAssessmentController` (Core SO + UI MB) — scores bot threat level based on `ZoneControlScoreboardSO.PlayerRank` and `ZoneDominanceSO.HasDominance`; `ThreatLevel` enum Low/Medium/High; fires `_onThreatChanged`; HUD shows coloured threat badge.

**M63 Zone Control Combo, Coop Score, Tournament &amp; League — ALL TASKS COMPLETE (T306–T309).**
- T306: `ZoneControlComboTrackerSO` (Core SO) — `RecordCapture()` increments `_comboCount`; multiplier=`Min(1+count×_multiplierPerCombo, _maxMultiplier)`; `Tick(dt)` advances `_timeSinceLastCapture` and calls `LoseCombo()` when window exceeded; `LoseCombo()` resets state and fires `_onComboLost`/`_onComboUpdated`; `Reset()` silent. `ZoneControlComboHUDController` (UI MB) — subscribes 4 channels; `Update→Tick`; `Refresh` shows "Combo: N" and "xF2". 12 tests.
- T307: `ZoneControlCoopScoreSO` (Core SO) — `AddPlayerCapture`/`AddAllyCapture` accumulate independently; `CheckMilestone()` fires `_onMilestoneReached` once when `TotalCaptures>=SharedMilestone`; `Reset()` silent. `ZoneControlCoopScoreController` (UI MB) — subscribes player/ally capture events→`Add*+Refresh`; Refresh shows labels + milestoneBadge. 12 tests.
- T308: `ZoneControlTournamentSO` (Core SO) — `_roundZoneTargets int[]` default {5,10,15}; `SubmitRoundResult(captured,target)` increments wins/losses; advances `_currentRound`; sets `_isComplete` and fires `_onTournamentComplete` when all rounds played; idempotent after complete; `LoadSnapshot`/`TakeSnapshot`/`Reset`. `ZoneControlTournamentController` (UI MB) — `HandleMatchEnded` reads `summarySO.TotalZonesCaptured` vs `CurrentRoundTarget`; Refresh shows round/wins/losses/target labels + completeBadge. 14 tests.
- T309: `ZoneControlLeagueSO` (Core SO) — `ZoneControlLeagueDivision` enum Bronze/Silver/Gold/Platinum; `AddRatingPoints(int)` adds `rating×_pointsPerRating`; `EvaluatePromotion()`: promotion when points≥threshold and div<Platinum; relegation when points<relegationThreshold and div>Bronze; each path fires distinct event + adjusts counts; `LoadSnapshot`/`TakeSnapshot`/`Reset`. `ZoneControlLeagueController` (UI MB) — subscribes `_onRatingSet`→`HandleRatingSet`→`AddRatingPoints(_ratingController.CurrentRating)`; 3 VoidGameEvent refresh channels; Refresh shows division/points/promotion labels. 12 tests.

**M62 Zone Control Achievements, Ranking, Daily Challenge &amp; High Score — ALL TASKS COMPLETE (T302–T305).**
- T302: `ZoneControlAchievementCatalogSO` (Core SO) — `ZoneControlAchievementType` enum TotalZones/Dominance/Streak; `ZoneControlAchievementEntry [Serializable]` sealed class (id/displayName/type/targetValue); `EvaluateAchievements(ZoneControlSessionSummarySO)` iterates entries, earns per metric, fires `_onAchievementUnlocked` per new achievement; idempotent; `LoadSnapshot(IReadOnlyList<string>)`/`TakeSnapshot()`/`Reset()`. `ZoneControlAchievementController` (UI MB) — subscribes `_onMatchEnded`→`HandleMatchEnded`→`EvaluateAchievements`+`Refresh`; subscribes `_onAchievementUnlocked`→`Refresh`; `_countLabel="{N}/{Total}"`; `_latestLabel=LatestEarnedDisplayName`. 12 tests.
- T303: `ZoneControlRankingSO` (Core SO) — `ZoneControlRankLevel` enum Unranked=0..Diamond=5; `_zoneThresholds int[]` default {10,25,50,100,200} + `_tierThresholds int[]` default {1,2,3,4,5}; `EvaluateRank(totalZones,unlockedTiers)` advances rank when zone OR tier threshold met, never decreases, fires `_onRankChanged`; `GetRankLabel()`; `GetNextZoneThreshold()` returns -1 at Diamond; `LoadSnapshot`/`TakeSnapshot`/`Reset`. `ZoneControlRankingController` (UI MB) — subscribes `_onGateUnlocked`→`HandleGateUnlocked`→`EvaluateRank`; subscribes `_onRankChanged`→`Refresh`; `_rankLabel`; `_nextThresholdLabel`. 14 tests.
- T304: `ZoneControlDailyChallengeConfig` (Core SO) — `_possibleTargets float[]` default {5,10,15,20,30}; `GetTodayTarget()` seeds `System.Random(DateTime.Today.GetHashCode())`; `GetSecondsUntilReset()` returns seconds to midnight UTC. `ZoneControlDailyChallengeController` (UI MB) — subscribes `_onMatchEnded`; `Refresh` shows `_targetLabel`+`_countdownLabel`; `Update` refreshes countdown live; `internal static FormatCountdown(int)`="Resets in Xh Ym". 12 tests.
- T305: `ZoneControlHighScoreSO` (Core SO) — `_onNewHighScore VoidGameEvent`; `_bestZoneCount/_bestPace/_bestStreak` + transient `IsNewZoneCount/IsNewPace/IsNewStreak`; `UpdateFromMatch` resets flags + updates independently per category + fires event per new record; `LoadSnapshot`/`TakeSnapshot()`/`Reset`. `ZoneControlHighScoreController` (UI MB) — subscribes `_onMatchEnded`+`_onNewHighScore`; `HandleMatchEnded` reads `TotalZonesCaptured`, `GetCapturesPerMinute(Time.time)`, `BestCaptureStreak`; `Refresh` labels+badges. 12 tests.

**Next milestone (M63):** Suggested directions: (a) `ZoneControlTournamentSO + ZoneControlTournamentController` (Core SO + UI MB) — multi-round zone-control tournament bracket with per-round zone targets, win/loss tracking, trophy reward on completion, and persistence; (b) `ZoneControlLeagueSO + ZoneControlLeagueController` (Core SO + UI MB) — seasonal league that accumulates zone rating points, assigns Bronze/Silver/Gold/Platinum divisions, awards end-of-season rewards, and persists promotion/relegation history; (c) `ZoneControlComboTrackerSO + ZoneControlComboHUDController` (Core SO + UI MB) — rapid consecutive zone captures within a time window accumulate a multiplier bonus; fires `_onComboLost` when the window expires; displays live combo count and multiplier in HUD; (d) `ZoneControlCoopScoreSO + ZoneControlCoopScoreController` (Core SO + UI MB) — cooperative two-player zone score SO that tracks player+ally combined captures, shared score milestone, and bonus threshold; Controller displays combined leaderboard.

**M61 Progression Gate, Weekly Challenge, Commentary &amp; Replay Export — ALL TASKS COMPLETE (T298–T301).**
- T298: `ZoneControlProgressionGateSO` (Core SO) — `_gateThresholds int[]` default {5,15,30,50,75}; `EvaluateGates(int)` iterates from `_unlockedTiers`, fires `_onGateUnlocked` per newly crossed threshold, idempotent; `LoadSnapshot(int)` clamps to [0,GateCount]; `Reset()` silent; `NextThreshold` returns -1 when `AllUnlocked`. `ZoneControlProgressionGateController` (UI MB) — subscribes `_onSummaryUpdated`+`_onGateUnlocked`→`Refresh`; calls `EvaluateGates` from `_summarySO.TotalZonesCaptured`; labels: "Tier: N", "Next: N zones"/"Max Tier!", "N / M"; panel hidden when gateSO null. 12 tests.
- T299: `ZoneControlWeeklyChallengeSO` (Core SO) — `ZoneControlChallengeType` enum ZoneCount/Streak/Pace; `_targetValue [Min(0.1f)]` default 10; `EvaluateChallenge(float)→bool` fires `_onChallengeComplete` on first completion, idempotent after; `Progress=Clamp01(bestValue/targetValue)`; `LoadSnapshot`/`TakeSnapshot`/`Reset` bootstrapper-safe. `ZoneControlWeeklyChallengeController` (UI MB) — `HandleMatchEnded` reads `TotalZonesCaptured` or `BestCaptureStreak` per `ChallengeType`; `progressBar.value=Progress`; label="N% Complete"/"Complete!"; completeBadge active when done. 14 tests.
- T300: `ZoneControlCommentaryCatalogSO` (Core SO) — `ZoneControlCommentaryEventType` enum FastPace/SlowPace/RatingSet/ZoneCaptured; 4 string[] message pools with inspector defaults; `GetMessage(type)` round-robin via per-type index; `ResetIndices()` zeros all; `OnEnable→ResetIndices()`. `ZoneControlMatchCommentaryController` (UI MB) — subscribes 4 event channels→Handle* methods→`ShowBanner(type)`: null catalog/empty msg→return; sets `_isActive`, timer, panel, label; `Update→Tick` auto-hides after `_displayDuration` (default 2s). 12 tests.
- T301: `ZoneControlReplayExportSO` (Core SO) — `ZoneControlReplayPayload [Serializable]`: `List<float> timestamps` + `List<string> captureStates` (comma-joined bool strings); `ExportToJson(replay)` builds payload via `EncodeCaptureState`, `JsonUtility.ToJson`, caches `_lastExportJson`, fires `_onExportCompleted`; `ParsePayload(json)→null` on failure; `Reset()` clears cache; `OnEnable→Reset()`. `ZoneControlReplayExportController` (Core MB) — `_autoExportOnMatchEnd bool` default true; `HandleMatchEnded→TriggerExport` when auto; `TriggerExport()→_exportSO?.ExportToJson(_replaySO)`. 12 tests.

**M60 Zone Control Career &amp; Adaptation Layer — ALL TASKS COMPLETE (T294–T297).**
- T294: `ZoneCapturePaceHistorySO` (Core SO) — ring buffer `List<float>` capacity default 5; `AddPaceReading` clamps ≥0 + prunes oldest + fires `_onPaceHistoryUpdated`; `LoadSnapshot` bootstrapper-safe. `ZoneCapturePaceHistoryController` (UI MB) — subscribes `_onMatchEnded`→`HandleMatchEnded`→`_trackerSO.GetCapturesPerMinute(Time.time)`+`AddPaceReading`; subscribes `_onPaceHistoryUpdated`→`Refresh`; bar chart: `_paceBarImages[i].enabled/fillAmount=Clamp01(rate/_maxDisplayRate)`. 12 tests.
- T295: `ZoneControlAdaptiveDifficultySO` (Core SO) — `Initialize(float)` sets `_currentDuration` clamped to [min,max]; `AdjustFromRating(int)` increases on rating≥4, decreases on rating≤2, no change on 3; all clamped; fires `_onDifficultyAdjusted`. `ZoneControlAdaptiveDifficultyController` (Core MB) — subscribes `_onRatingHistoryUpdated`→reads last rating from `_historySO.GetRatings()`→`_difficultySO.AdjustFromRating`. 12 tests.
- T296: `ZoneControlCareerSummaryController` (UI MB) — subscribes `_onSummaryUpdated`→`Refresh`; labels: "Total Zones: N", "Avg/Match: F1", "Best Streak: N"; badge sparkline from `ZoneControlMatchRatingHistorySO`: 1-2★ red, 3★ yellow, 4-5★ green; panel hidden when summarySO null. 12 tests.
- T297: `ZoneControlSessionReportController` (UI MB) — subscribes `_onMatchEnded`→`HandleMatchEnded`→`Refresh`; labels: "Zones: N", "Matches: N", "Rating: N / 5" (from `_ratingController.CurrentRating`), advice (from `_advisorController.ComputeAdvice()`); panel hidden when summarySO null; all scene refs optional/null-safe. 14 tests.

**Next milestone (M62):** Suggested directions: (a) `ZoneControlAchievementCatalogSO + ZoneControlAchievementController` (Core SO + UI MB) — catalog of zone-capture achievements (e.g. "Capture 50 zones", "Win with full dominance", "Complete 3 weekly challenges"); evaluates against `ZoneControlSessionSummarySO` at match end; fires `_onAchievementUnlocked` per newly earned achievement; `LoadSnapshot` tracks earned IDs; (b) `ZoneControlRankingSO + ZoneControlRankingController` (Core SO + UI MB) — assigns a rank title (Bronze/Silver/Gold/Platinum/Diamond) based on cumulative `TotalZonesCaptured` + `UnlockedTiers`; subscribes `_onGateUnlocked`→`EvaluateRank`; fires `_onRankChanged`; HUD shows rank badge and next-rank threshold; (c) `ZoneControlDailyChallengeConfig + ZoneControlDailyChallengeController` (Core SO + UI MB) — re-rolls a fresh `ZoneControlWeeklyChallengeSO`-compatible target daily using a seeded RNG from `System.DateTime.Today`; shows countdown label "Resets in Xh Ym"; (d) `ZoneControlHighScoreSO + ZoneControlHighScoreController` (Core SO + UI MB) — persists best single-match zone count, best pace, and best streak; `LoadSnapshot`/`TakeSnapshot` bootstrapper-safe; updates at match end; fires `_onNewHighScore` per category; HUD shows current bests with "NEW!" badge.

**M50 Zone Control Orchestration &amp; Feedback — ALL TASKS COMPLETE (T255–T258).**
- T255: `ControlZoneCatalogSO` + `ControlZoneCatalogController` — Core SO catalog of `ControlZoneSO[]`; `GetZone(int)` null-safe bounds-checked; `ResetAll()` iterates non-null entries; Controller MB subscribes match start/end → `_catalog?.ResetAll()`; `EntryCount` delegates to catalog. 12 tests.
- T256: `ZoneDominanceSO` + `ZoneDominanceController` — Core SO tracks player zone count; `AddPlayerZone/RemovePlayerZone` clamped to `[0,TotalZones]` + fire `_onDominanceChanged`; `HasDominance = count*2 > TotalZones`; Controller bridges `_onPlayerZoneCaptured`→`AddPlayerZone`, `_onPlayerZoneLost`→`RemovePlayerZone`, match events→`Reset`. 14 tests.
- T257: `ZoneDominanceHUDController` — UI MB subscribes `_onDominanceChanged`→`Refresh`; label `"P: N / Total"`, `_dominanceBar.value = DominanceRatio`, `_bonusPanel.SetActive(HasDominance)`; panel hidden when SO null. 12 tests.
- T258: `ZoneCaptureNotificationController` — UI MB timed notification banner; `ShowCapture/ShowLost` sets label + panel active + timer; `Tick` decrements and hides on expiry; defaults: 2s, "ZONE CAPTURED!", "ZONE LOST!". 12 tests.

**Next milestone (M51):** Suggested directions: (a) `ZoneDominanceBonusApplier` (Physics MB) — subscribes `_onMatchStarted`; reads `ZoneDominanceSO.HasDominance`; if true, applies a flat damage or score bonus via `WeaponAttachmentController.AddDamageBonus` or `ScoreMultiplierSO.SetMultiplier`; reset at match end; (b) `ControlZonePresenterController` (UI MB) — reads `ControlZoneCatalogSO`; displays a row per zone showing `ZoneId`, `CaptureRatio` Slider, and Captured/Uncaptured badge; subscribes to each zone's `_onCaptured`/`_onLost` for reactive refresh; (c) `ZoneObjectiveSO` + `ZoneObjectiveController` (Core) — match win-by-zones condition: player wins if `ZoneDominanceSO.PlayerZoneCount >= _requiredZones` at match end; fires `_onObjectiveComplete` VoidGameEvent; Controller subscribes `_onMatchEnded` and evaluates; (d) `ZoneTimerSO` + `ZoneTimerController` (Core) — per-zone capture cooldown: after a zone is lost, block re-capture for `_cooldownDuration` seconds; Controller subscribes `_onLost`; sets `_isOnCooldown`; blocks `ControlZoneController` via a shared bool channel or SO flag.

**M48 Arena Phase-Hazard Integration &amp; Clock — ALL TASKS COMPLETE (T247–T250).**
- T247: `ArenaPhaseHazardBridgeSO` + `ArenaPhaseHazardBridgeController` — config SO pairs phase `VoidGameEvent` → `HazardZoneGroupSO`; controller pre-allocates per-entry delegates in Awake; OnEnable subscribes all channels; `ActivateGroup(i)` deactivates all other groups then activates target. 14 tests.
- T248: `MatchClockSO` + `MatchClockHUDController` — authoritative countdown SO (180s default, 30s warning threshold); `StartClock/StopClock/Tick/Reset`; HUD formats `MM:SS`, shows warning panel on `WarningFired`; delegates match-start/end events to SO. 16 tests.
- T249: `ArenaHazardResetController` — Physics MB subscribes `_onMatchStarted`; `HandleMatchStarted()` sets `IsActive=false` on all `HazardZoneController[]` + calls `Reset()` on all `HazardZoneGroupSO[]` silently; fully null-safe. 14 tests.
- T250: `WaveHazardIntensifierSO` + `WaveHazardIntensifierController` — formula `Max(min, base − wave×reduction)`; `HazardZoneGroupToggleController` patched with `SetToggleInterval(float)`; controller subscribes `_onWaveStarted`; reads `WaveManagerSO.CurrentWave`; applies interval to all `_toggleControllers`. 14 tests.

**Next milestone (M49):** Suggested directions: (a) `MatchClockManagerController` (Core MB) — subscribes `_onMatchStarted`/`_onMatchEnded`; calls `MatchClockSO.StartClock()`/`StopClock()` centrally so individual UI controllers don't need to drive the clock; optional `_clockSO` + two VoidGameEvent channels; pairs with `MatchClockHUDController` for complete clock pipeline; (b) `ArenaHazardPhaseIntegrator` (Physics MB) — combines `ArenaPhaseController` + `ArenaPhaseHazardBridgeController` + `ArenaHazardResetController` in a single orchestrator; subscribes `_onMatchStarted`; calls `HandleMatchStarted` on all three in order (reset → phase start → bridge ready); single inspector slot instead of three separate GOs; (c) `HazardZoneGroupCatalogPresenter` (UI MB) — reads `HazardZoneGroupCatalogSO`; subscribes `_onGroupActivated`/`_onGroupDeactivated` for each group; maintains a grid of status indicators (active=green, inactive=red) for arena-state HUD; (d) `WaveIntensityHUDController` (UI MB) — reads `WaveHazardIntensifierSO` + `WaveManagerSO`; displays current wave toggle interval as "Hazard Speed: Xs"; subscribes `_onWaveStarted` for live refresh.

**M47 Arena Automation &amp; Catalog Layer — ALL TASKS COMPLETE (T243–T246).**
- T243: `HazardZoneGroupToggleController` (Physics MB: auto-toggles `_group HazardZoneGroupSO` every `_toggleInterval [Min(1f)]` seconds during a match; HandleMatchStarted/HandleMatchEnded start/stop; Tick accumulates dt; fires `_onGroupToggled` on each toggle; all refs optional; zero alloc). 14 tests.
- T244: `RespawnProtectionHUDController` (UI MB: drives local countdown from same `_onRespawnReady` event + `RespawnProtectionSO.ProtectionDuration`; no Physics refs; Tick updates `_shieldBar.value=remaining/duration` + `_timerLabel="{remaining:F1}s"`; EndProtection hides `_panel`). 14 tests.
- T245: `ArenaPhase` [Serializable] struct + `ArenaPhaseControllerSO` SO + `ArenaPhaseController` MB (Core: data-driven N-phase lifecycle; HandleMatchStarted fires phase[0] event; Tick advances→AdvancePhase; AdvancePhase fires next event or `OnAllPhasesComplete`; Tick/AdvancePhase public for EditMode). 16 tests.
- T246: `HazardZoneGroupCatalogSO` SO + `HazardZoneGroupCatalogController` MB (Core: catalog of `HazardZoneGroupSO[]`; GetGroup(int) null-safe bounds-checked; controller exposes ActivateGroup/DeactivateGroup/ToggleGroup(int); all null-safe pass-throughs; no Update — command-driven). 12 tests.

**Next milestone (M48):** Suggested directions: (a) `ArenaPhaseHazardBridgeSO` + `ArenaPhaseHazardBridgeController` (Core MB) — binds each `ArenaPhaseControllerSO` phase index to a `HazardZoneGroupSO` entry; when a phase fires its event, the bridge activates the matching group and deactivates all others; config SO holds `ArenaPhaseHazardBridgeEntry[] { int phaseIndex; HazardZoneGroupSO group; }`; pairs ArenaPhaseController + HazardZoneGroupCatalog; (b) `MatchClockSO` + `MatchClockHUDController` (Core SO + UI MB) — authoritative in-match countdown/count-up timer; `_duration [Min(1f)]`; `Tick(dt)` accumulates; fires `_onTimeWarning` at configurable threshold; fires `_onTimeExpired`; HUD shows MM:SS + warning flash when near zero; (c) `ArenaHazardResetController` (Physics MB) — subscribes `_onMatchStarted`; calls `IsActive=false` on all managed `HazardZoneController[]` and calls `Reset()` on `HazardZoneGroupSO[]` and `ArenaHazardSequenceSO`; ensures clean arena state at match start without scene reload; (d) `WaveHazardIntensifierSO` + `WaveHazardIntensifierController` (Core SO + Physics MB) — integrates with `WaveManagerSO`; each wave multiplies hazard cycle speed or toggle interval; `_intensityPerWave [Min(0f)]`; patches `ArenaHazardSequenceController.Config.CycleDuration` or `HazardZoneGroupToggleController._toggleInterval` via public setters added for the purpose.

**ArenaHazardWarningController wiring (T226) — Editor-session steps:**
1. Add `ArenaHazardWarningController` to the in-match HUD canvas.
   - `_hazardZones`      → Array of HazardZoneSO assets (one per arena hazard).
   - `_hazardTransforms` → Parallel array of Transforms at each hazard's world position.
   - `_robotTransform`   → The player robot's root Transform.
   - `_warningDistance`  → Distance threshold (e.g. 10f world units).
   - `_bannerPanel`      → Root warning panel (hidden when all hazards are out of range).
   - `_hazardNameLabel`  → Text showing the nearest hazard type name.
   - `_distanceLabel`    → Text showing "{N}m" distance to nearest hazard.

**RespawnCountdownController wiring (T227) — Editor-session steps:**
1. Create a `RobotRespawn` SO asset: Assets ▶ Create ▶ BattleRobots ▶ Core ▶ RobotRespawn.
   - Wire `_onRespawnUsed` → a shared VoidGameEvent (e.g. "OnRespawnUsed").
   - Wire `_onRespawnReady` → a shared VoidGameEvent (e.g. "OnRespawnReady").
2. Add `RespawnCountdownController` to the in-match HUD canvas.
   - `_respawnSO`              → the RobotRespawnSO asset above.
   - `_onRespawnUsed`          → same VoidGameEvent.
   - `_onRespawnReady`         → same VoidGameEvent.
   - `_countdownLabel`         → Text showing "N.Fs" while cooling down, or "Ready".
   - `_respawnsRemainingLabel` → Text showing "{N} left".
   - `_panel`                  → Root panel.
3. Call RobotRespawnSO.UseRespawn() when the robot is destroyed.
4. Wire RobotRespawnSO.Reset() to the MatchStarted event.

**BonusObjectiveHUDController wiring (T228) — Editor-session steps:**
1. Create a `MatchBonusObjective` SO asset: Assets ▶ Create ▶ BattleRobots ▶ Core ▶ MatchBonusObjective.
   - Set `_bonusTitle`, `_bonusReward`, and `_timeLimit` (0 = no time limit).
   - Wire `_onChanged` → a shared VoidGameEvent (e.g. "OnBonusObjectiveChanged").
2. Add `BonusObjectiveHUDController` to the in-match HUD canvas.
   - `_bonusObjective` → the MatchBonusObjectiveSO asset above.
   - `_onChanged`      → same VoidGameEvent.
   - `_titleLabel`     → Text for the objective title.
   - `_statusLabel`    → Text showing "COMPLETE!" / "EXPIRED" / countdown / "Active".
   - `_rewardLabel`    → Text showing "Reward: N".
   - `_timerBar`       → Slider driven by TimeRatio [0→1].
   - `_panel`          → Root panel.
3. Call MatchBonusObjectiveSO.Complete() when the player satisfies the bonus condition.
4. Wire MatchBonusObjectiveSO.Reset() to the MatchStarted event.
